title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Orochi, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Momonosuke, Luffy as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No good. Even if we get outside,

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It's a mild burn, man up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Break the wall already, before we both die!! Who cares if it costs you an arm?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no point in having a big body if you don't use it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: By what?! you wanna go, bastard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shut up!! I've got to do something!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna save kin, Kiku, and myself to boot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This fire is getting outta hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which way am I even meant to go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Or zero's not gonna make it!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: We're gonna burn to death before that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep whining like a bunch of weaklings, and I'll burn ya myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am truly grateful that you agreed to put your faith in me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy decided to ally with you Samura!! How could I possibly doubt you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The feeling is mutual!! I believe in you as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ever since that day, I swore I would never be unprepared!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
